title: codereview pass 2 finding 3/3: pseudocode in select_channel uses now_ts but no normative definition of wrap-around interaction with blacklist_until[] timers (u32 subtract could underflow if not careful); recommend explicit (now_ts - blacklist_until[ch]) & 0xFFFFFFFFu or cross-ref TDMA
close_reason: Added normative u32 wrap-around clarification for blacklist_until timers in select_channel/now() section per finding; cross-ref to 2a.2 and draft-lichen-tdma. Commit 5daf4c1e1
